name: I'm at the east end of a parking lot
description: I'm at the east end of a parking lot
hints: East end of a parking lot north of Main Street. The mountain is nearby.
NORTH leads toward the mountain. WEST goes to the other end of the parking lot where the jet car is parked.
NORTH to the foot of the mountain (room 22). SOUTH back to Main & Mountain View (room 4). WEST to the west parking lot (room 19) with the jet car.
notes: East end of parking lot. NORTH to mountain foot (room 22). SOUTH to Main & Mountain View (room 4). WEST to west parking lot (room 19) where the jet car is.
